creator: freebsd@mosedal.net
text:
Hi,
I should have mentioned it previously; I test-built this on 12.0-amd64. - I haven't tested the ARM or other 32-bit architectures as OSM datasets are quite large.
I only use the port occasionally; but I often check for updates etc. If you want me to maintain it, I'll do my best.

All the best,

Peter.
